## Type of Change
- [ ] feat: new feature
- [ ] fix: bug fix
- [ ] refactor: code change (no feature/fix)
- [ ] test: adding/updating tests
- [ ] chore: build, CI, dependencies

## Test Plan
- [ ] Tests written first (TDD)
- [ ] All new code has tests
- [ ] Coverage ≥ 80%
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
